meta.title: kulupu lipu pi pali pona (toki pona) — ale li free
meta.description: ni li tomo pi lipu free: lipu pi kama sona, lipu pi toki ante, en lipu pi pali sona.

hero.title: kulupu lipu pi pali pona (toki pona) — ale li free
hero.subtitle: ni li tomo pi lipu free: lipu pi kama sona, lipu pi toki ante, en lipu pi pali sona. o open kepeken lipu 'Reader’s Kit', o pana e kama sona lon lipu 'Chinese Wisdom', o kama sona e lipu 'Heart Sutra' lon toki pona.
hero.note: ale li free. sina ken lukin, sina ken kama jo. sina wile ala e nimi lon lipu.

why.title: tan seme la kulupu ni li pona?

clarity.title: toki lili, lukin pona
clarity.text: toki pona li weka e ike. lipu ni li pona tawa tenpo lili, li pona tawa lukin sin.

free.title: open pi pali free
free.text: lipu ale lon tomo ni li free: sina ken kama jo e lipu PDF, en sina ken lukin e lipu pona tawa kama sona.

practice.title: pali tawa kama sona
practice.text: o kepeken ona sama nasin: o open, o lukin, o sin, o kama sona mute. kama sona li lon lukin mute, lon sona ala taso.

collection.title: lipu free
collection.subtitle: lipu tu wan pi open: o kama sona e toki pona kepeken lipu lon nasin pona.

readers-kit.title: lipu pi kama sona tawa lukin (Reader’s Kit)
readers-kit.author: jan ABVX
readers-kit.summary: lipu pi open tawa jan sin: o kama sona e toki pona kepeken lukin pi lipu lili.
readers-kit.notes: lipu ni li lipu pi open tawa jan pi kama sona. nasin lipu li pona tawa lukin sin en kama sona nimi.

chinese-wisdom.title: sona pi ma Sonko (Chinese Wisdom)
chinese-wisdom.author: jan ABVX
chinese-wisdom.summary: lipu free pi toki lili sinpin, ante tawa toki pona, tawa lukin sin.
chinese-wisdom.notes: lipu ni li pali tawa kama sona: nasin sitelen li sama lon lipu ale, la sina ken weka e wile pi alasa sona ike, o lukin taso, o lukin sin.

heart-sutra.title: lipu 'Heart Sutra' lon toki pona
heart-sutra.author: jan ABVX
heart-sutra.summary: toki ante free tawa lukin sin en kama sona; lipu lili tawa lukin mute.
heart-sutra.notes: lipu ni li lili, la ona li pona tawa lukin sin lon tenpo mute.

faq.title: sona lili (FAQ)
faq.subtitle: nimi lili pi sona: toki, free, kepeken.

items.a: tomo ni li kulupu pi lipu free tawa lukin: lipu kama sona en lipu toki ante lon toki pona.

items.q: ni ale li free ala free?
items.a: ni ale li free. sina ken kama jo e lipu, sina ken lukin e lipu, sina wile ala e nimi.

items.q: mi wile sona e toki pona la mi ken open?
items.a: sina ken. lipu 'Reader’s Kit' li pali tawa jan pi open. nasin sitelen li pana e pona tawa lukin.

items.q: mi ken kama sona lon tenpo mi taso?
items.a: sina ken. o lukin lili, o lukin sin, o toki e nimi pi kama lon lukin. ni li pona tawa kama sona.

items.q: tan seme la sitelen li lon tu?
items.a: lipu mute la sitelen Latin en sitelen pona-ready li lon. ni li pona tawa lukin e nimi lon tenpo kama.

items.q: mi ken toki e pakala lon seme?
items.a: o open e issue lon GitHub, o pana e link, o toki e pakala lili.

paragraphs: lipu 'Reader’s Kit' li lipu pi open tawa jan pi kama sona. ona li pana e lipu lili tawa lukin, tawa ni: sina ken open lukin e toki pona lon tenpo poka.
nasin lipu li pana e pali pona: o lukin lili, o lukin sin, o sona e nimi pi kama lon lukin. lipu mute la sitelen Latin en sitelen pona-ready li lon, tawa pona pi lukin.
o kepeken lipu ni sama open. tenpo la sina kama sona e nasin, la o tawa lipu ante free lon tomo ni, o kama sona mute kepeken lukin.
lipu 'Chinese Wisdom' li lipu free. ona li ante e toki pi lipu sinpin lon toki pona lon nasin pi lukin pona, pi pilin pona.
lipu ni li pali tawa kama sona: nasin sitelen li sama lon lipu ale, la sina ken weka e wile pi alasa sona ike, o lukin taso, o lukin sin.
sina pilin pona tan nasin ni la o kepeken ona sama nasin tawa kama sona. lukin mute li pana e sona mute.
lipu 'Heart Sutra' lon toki pona li toki ante free tawa lukin en tawa kama sona. lipu ni li lili, la ona li pona tawa lukin sin lon tenpo mute.
lon lipu ni la sina ken kama jo e lipu PDF, en sina ken lukin e toki ante. sina wile pana e sona sin anu toki e pakala la o open e issue lon GitHub.
o lukin kepeken tenpo lili. o lukin sin. lukin mute la nimi en nasin toki li kama sona.

legal.title: nasin (legal)
body: tomo ni li kulupu pi lipu free tawa toki pona. ABVX li pana e link tawa lipu PDF en lipu pi pona lukin.
sina ken kepeken lipu ni tawa pali pi mani ala. sipisi la lipu wan li jo e nasin (license) la nasin ona li lawa.
ABVX li pana e lipu sama ni: ‘ona li lon’. link ante li ken kama pakala. sina lukin e pakala la o toki lon GitHub.

privacy.title: len (privacy)
body: tomo ni li wile ala e nimi pi jan. sina ken lukin e lipu, sina ken kama jo e lipu, sina pana ala e sona sina.
ken la ilo server li awen e sona lili tawa sona pi pali (IP, user-agent). mi pana ala e sona pi jan tawa mani.
sina toki tawa mi kepeken email la mi kepeken toki sina tawa toki sin taso. sina ken toki e pakala lon GitHub kin.

translator.title: ante toki pona
translator.subtitle: o ante e toki tawa toki pona.

learn.title: o kama sona e toki pona
learn.subtitle: nasin kama sona en ilo lipu.
